title: Italian Suppli Rice Balls
description: A classic Italian snack made with risotto, mozzarella, and tomato sauce, coated in breadcrumbs and deep-fried to crispy perfection.
instructions: Cook the Italian rice according to package instructions.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the cooked rice, mozzarella cheese, and tomato sauce.
Mix well until all the ingredients are fully incorporated.
Add the egg to the mixture and stir until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for about 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Divide the dough into small portions, about the size of a golf ball.
Shape each portion into a ball and then flatten it slightly into a disk shape.
Dip each disk into the breadcrumbs, pressing the crumbs gently onto the surface to help them stick.
Heat about 2-3 inches of vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
When the oil is hot, add a few of the breaded rice balls to the pan and fry until they are golden brown and crispy.
Remove the suppli from the oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
Serve the suppli hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
